title: Valid Tic-Tac-Toe State
description: Bàn cờ tic-tac-toe 3×3 với X,O. Kiểm tra board có valid state không (đúng lượt, không ai thắng hai, số X = O hoặc O+1).
approach: Đếm X,O; check win lines; valid nếu count ok và không conflict winners và winner matches count.
memoryTip: Valid tic-tac-toe = count X/O + single winner consistent with turns.

solutions.python:
class Solution:
    def validTicTacToe(self, board: List[str]) -> bool:
        b = board
        def win(c):
            return any(all(b[r][c2]==c for c2 in range(3)) for r in range(3)) or \
                   any(all(b[r2][c]==c for r2 in range(3)) for c in range(3)) or \
                   all(b[i][i]==c for i in range(3)) or all(b[i][2-i]==c for i in range(3))
        x = sum(row.count("X") for row in b)
        o = sum(row.count("O") for row in b)
        if o not in (x, x-1): return False
        if win("X") and o == x: return False
        if win("O") and x != o: return False
        if win("X") and win("O"): return False
        return True

analysis.correctness: Rules X first → counts; winner must align with last move player.
